content.text: This privacy disclosure explains how we collect, use and protect personal data when you use our website.
This content is intended as a starting point and should be adapted to reflect your real processing activities.
The organization operating this website is responsible for the personal data processing described on this page.
The categories of personal data we process depend on how you interact with the website.
When you send us a message through the contact form, we may process your name, email address and message content.

content.why: To respond to your inquiry and maintain relevant communication
content.how: Submitted by you through the website and processed in our communication tools

content.text: We may process technical information such as IP address, browser type, language preferences and device-related metadata.

content.why: To secure, maintain and improve the website
content.how: Collected automatically by the browser, server or infrastructure when visiting the site
